    Don’t Miss

    Tuesday July 14th — Water Day
    2:00 – 4:00 PM · Wear clothes to get wet & dirty — bring a towel
    Thursday July 16th — Field Day (Crucible Obstacle Course)
    2:00 – 4:00 PM · Wear clothes to get wet & dirty — towel recommended

    7:00 – 10:00 PM · Water baptism takes place at the end of the evening service
